Author: The Replit Team
Title: Replit — Replit Goes "Pro" with More Discounts & More Collaborators
Text:
Summary
We’re introducing a new Pro plan and bringing collaboration to Core so you can build more, collaborate more, and better control how you use credits. These changes will take effect on Feb 24, 2026.
- New Pro plan starts at $100/month for teams, includes tiered credits with discounts, priority support, and up to 15 builders.
- Core plan now includes real collaboration for up to 5 people—previously exclusive to Teams users.
- The Teams plan will be sunset, and all Teams users will be automatically upgraded to Pro at no additional cost for the remainder of their term, with access to enhanced features.
- Simplified collaboration experience with clearer personal vs. team workspaces, easier team collaboration, and better app organization and control.
Why we are making these changes
We launched Agent over a year ago. Since then, our product has evolved significantly, but our pricing has stayed largely the same. Over the past year, we've gathered extensive feedback on what's working and what isn’t when it comes to pricing.
Based on that feedback we are prioritizing three things:
- Less credit anxiety. Prepaid monthly credits and credit packs make it easier to budget and plan around big pushes.
- Collaborative building experience for all paid users. Building together should not be a premium add‑on. Core now includes real collaboration so you can ship projects with others without creating a separate Teams subscription.
- Clear, transparent value. When you pay more, you get more: higher discounts on credits, faster support, longer data retention, and access to a community of serious builders.
What’s changing
1. A new collaboration experience
- Personal and Collaborative workspaces. Working on an app for a personal project? Do that in your personal workspace. Want to add team members and have everyone create apps on their own? Do that in your collaborative workspace.
- Better app management and control. You’ll have the ability to better organize apps in your workspaces, control budgets, and find what you’re looking for more easily.
2. A new Pro plan for serious builders
We’ve watched professionals and small teams push the limits on Replit. They need something more powerful.
Pro starts at $100/month for your whole team. It includes:
- Different monthly credit tiers. Take advantage of our largest discounts. Buy in advance, save more, and easily add credits as your usage grows. Unused credits will roll over for one month on the Pro plan so you do not lose what you have paid for.
- Priority support. Responses in under 24 hours on business days, so you are not blocked when you are shipping.
- Teams that work. You no longer have to pay for each user you invite. Up to 15 builders, pooled credits, and budget controls.
- 4× data retention window. When you delete a database, you’ll now have up to 28 days to recover your data (instead of 7 days).
- Access to an exclusive community. Learn from other serious builders, share what you are working on, and get exclusive opportunities to chat with our team.
- And more exclusive Agent features. Stay tuned for more goodness coming exclusively to Pro this year!
3. An upgraded Core experience, for no change in price
Our Core plan is getting two of our most requested capabilities:
- Real collaboration. Invite up to 5 people to build together on your projects. This used to be an exclusive Teams or Enterprise feature. Now it is included with Core, and you no longer need to pay for a separate Teams subscription or buy a seat for every collaborator.
- Credit packs. Have a project you are trying to finish or a spike in traffic coming up? Buy a credit pack to get a discount and budget for that work up front. These are available now for all Core users.
4. Teams users transitioned to Pro at no cost for the remainder of the term
Currently on Teams? The Teams plan is being sunset and you are getting upgraded to Pro automatically, at no additional cost, for the remainder of your current subscription term.
- For customers on our monthly Teams subscription, you will not be charged anything until next month. On your next renewal date after Feb 20th, you’ll be charged for the Pro plan at $100/month.
- For customers on our yearly Teams subscription, you’ll receive $100 of credits each month for free for the remainder of your subscription term. You will not be charged until your next renewal, when your pricing will change to $100/month.
- If you have multiple Teams organizations: each workspace will migrate to its own Pro subscription for the remainder of its term. You will soon be able to consolidate or reorganize after the migration if that better fits how your teams work.
Please check your email for the specific details and timelines for your workspace.
What’s next
Starting on Feb 20, 2026:
- Existing Teams plans will be migrated to the new Pro plan for the remainder of their subscription term at no extra charge.
- All users will be able to purchase the Pro plan (and add more credits per month, if needed).
- Core users will be able to invite collaborators directly into their projects.
These changes are the foundation for bigger things coming later in 2026. We will share more soon, including a dedicated overview of all the product updates that go along with this pricing change.
Current customers will receive detailed migration information via email. Questions? Check our docs or contact support.
